G'Mayun.name: G'梅云 G'Mayun
G'Mayun.description:
G'mayun 是类人生物的热带鸟类，从恶魔的腐化中解放出来，但仍被困在内心希望与诱惑两首对决之歌之间。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.5YxhwLoDO6F01swK]{G'Mayun}

G'mayun are humanoid tropical birds, liberated from demonic corruption but still trapped between the dueling songs of hope and temptation within their hearts.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.5YxhwLoDO6F01swK]{G'Mayun}

Orpok.name: 奥尔波克 Orpok
Orpok.description:
奥波克是体格健壮、带有猪科特征的人形生物。他们拥有敏锐的嗅觉与味觉感官，使其成为无与伦比的美食家。坚韧且勤劳，许多奥波克更偏好在辛勤劳作后享受安逸的生活。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.o4TCqZYD4Vl0mzjZ]{Orpok}

Orpoks are stout humanoids with porcine features. They have keen senses of smell and taste, making them peerless gourmands. Hardy and hardworking, many orpoks prefer well-earned lives of ease.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.o4TCqZYD4Vl0mzjZ]{Orpok}

Xotlxotl.name: 索特尔索特尔 Xotlxotl
Xotlxotl.description:
一种痴迷于完美的古老两栖类人种族，xotlxotl 将形态的可塑性提升到了新的高度。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.PZRhLFK2FXF5sv6Q]{Xotlxotl}

An ancient species of amphibious humanoids obsessed with perfection, xotlxotl take plasticity of form to new heights.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.PZRhLFK2FXF5sv6Q]{Xotlxotl}

Chochori.name: 乔科乔里 Chochori
Chochori.description:
乔科里是两栖的珊瑚族人，拥有复杂的文化，有其独特的社会群体划分、生命周期以及看待世界的方式，与其他族裔截然不同。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.zzJSz2udZm2OeAf9]{乔科里}

Chochori are amphibious coral people who have a complex culture with their own unique social groupings, life cycle, and way of looking at the world, distinct from other ancestries.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.zzJSz2udZm2OeAf9]{Chochori}

Kragrak.name: 克拉格拉克 Kragrak
Kragrak.description:
克拉格拉克是适应性强的大地族人，会根据两次成年仪式改变其大地形态，并常与一种次要元素产生联系。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.u1pBEFgctn6WNrBW]{克拉格拉克}

Kragraks are adaptable earth people who transform their earthen forms based on two coming of age rituals and often associate with a secondary element.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.u1pBEFgctn6WNrBW]{Kragrak}

Hardriggan.name: 哈德里根 Hardriggan
Hardriggan.description:
哈德里根是强大的类人生物，带有公羊般的特征，包括巨大卷曲的犄角。哈德里根很快就会对他人宣示支配地位；有时（也并非毫无道理）他们被描绘成专横好斗。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.VafJSGZOqZBZZ6pW]{哈德里根}

Hardriggans are mighty humanoids with ram-like features, including great curling horns. Quick to assert dominance over others, hardriggans have been painted, sometimes not unfairly, as domineering and bellicose.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.VafJSGZOqZBZZ6pW]{Hardriggan}

Bannog.name: 班诺格 Bannog
Bannog.description:
班诺格是来自梦境维度的双足、类兔异怪，喜爱恶作剧与游戏，并以创造力与随机应变来穿行于生命。被漂流至物质位面的班诺格过着同等重要的两种生活：清醒的生命与梦境的生命。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.bUu2Phh1ig5z0dc4]{班诺格}

Bannogs are bipedal, rabbit-like aberrations from the Dimension of Dreams who have a fondness for tricks and games and who navigate life with creativity and resourcefulness. Bannogs cast adrift on the Material Plane live two lives of equal importance: waking life and dreaming life.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.bUu2Phh1ig5z0dc4]{Bannog}

Bacoo.name: 巴库 Bacoo
Bacoo.description:
巴库是一种妖精，它们来到物质位面以更多了解其居民，却因所见所闻而惊骇不已，最终认定这种存在必定是个残酷的玩笑。为应对这番顿悟，它们选择加入这场“乐子”，模仿所遇见动物的形态，成为爱恶作剧的捣蛋鬼。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.F84UDZiKM0oL1kAK]{巴库}

Bacoo are fey who traveled to the Material Plane to learn more about its inhabitants and became so horrified at what they found that they decided this existence must be a cruel joke. Their method of coping with their epiphany was to join in on the fun, imitating the forms of animals they encountered and becoming mischievous tricksters.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-journals.JournalEntry.W9kPftynQPH0q8DO.JournalEntryPage.F84UDZiKM0oL1kAK]{Bacoo}
